name: Vanshika Sabharwal
bio: BTech student passionate about solving real-world problems using technology, with a growing interest in AI, data-driven systems, and innovative solutions.
objective: To build impactful and intelligent systems using AI and modern technologies while continuously learning and improving as a developer.
aboutHtml:
I am a BTech student currently exploring the world of technology with a strong interest in artificial intelligence and problem-solving. I enjoy working on real-world projects that help me understand how systems are built and optimized.

I am currently learning machine learning and improving my programming skills while actively participating in team-based projects. I aim to build solutions that are both practical and meaningful.

projects.title: Smart Yatra - Travel Planning Platform
projects.description: Developed a smart travel platform for efficient trip planning and route optimization, with enhanced user experience through structured data handling and blockchain-based tourist identity management.

sections.title: Summary
sections.content: Motivated BTech student with a growing interest in AI and data-driven systems. Passionate about learning, building real-world projects, and continuously improving technical skills.
